title: Left join preload on has_one
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_profile_data/0` that returns all users with their `:profile` (a has_one) preloaded. Since has_one is single-row-per-parent, a left_join_preload is appropriate and produces one query. Use `left_join: pr in assoc(u, :profile), preload: [profile: pr]`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Reinforces the has_one preload nuance — unlike has_many, has_one benefits from the single-query join approach.
